productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid White Polo Tshirt
description: Composition  White polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed cuffs and collar, buttoned chest placket, branding embroidered on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring, tumble dry, scrub or dry clean Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Take sophisticated dressing to the next level with this polo t-shirt from united colors of benetton. The plain block of colour gives a burst of energy, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Pair this tee with denims and sneakers for casual Fridays and for casual outings. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5.8&rdquo and chest 33"
